requirement.description: When engine temperature returns within safe operating limits, the system shall immediately deactivate the high-temperature warning.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that HighTempWarn is cleared when engine temperature falls back within safe limits.
test_steps: Reduce engine temperature below limit via CAPL

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn deactivates exactly at threshold crossing.
test_cases.expected_result: HighTempWarn transitions 1 → 0 within next CAN frame

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn remains inactive when temperature remains below limit.
Verify no oscillation or flicker when temperature stabilizes below threshold.
test_cases.expected_result: HighTempWarn remains stable at 0 with no toggling
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s12_rec_004(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_WARNINGS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    states = [decode_high_temp_warn(m) for m in msgs]
    assert all(s == 0 for s in states)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify HighTempWarn deactivation independent of vehicle speed.
Verify HighTempWarn deactivation independent of door states.
test_cases.expected_result: HighTempWarn remains 0 regardless of door states

test_steps: Capture first Gateway_Warnings frame after recovery

test_cases.test_objective: Verify deterministic recovery behavior over repeated cycles.
